name: Nureca Limited
summary: Nureca Limited, a B2C company, engages in the home healthcare and wellness products business primarily in India. It offers electric massagers, nebulizers, blood pressure monitors, glucometers, infrared thermometers for temperature scanning, fingertip pulse oximeters, weighing scales, home spa humidifiers and steamers, office electronics, rapid test kits, USB port car mobile chargers, and car mobile holder magnetic stands; and rehabilitation, mother and baby care, personal care and hygiene, nutrition, connected health care, and fitness products. The company offers its products under Dr Trust, Dr Physio, and Dr Trust brands. Its products provide consumers with tools to monitor chronic ailments and other diseases. The company sells its products through online channel partners comprising e-commerce companies, distributors, and retailers; and through its website, drtrust.in. Nureca Limited was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Chandigarh, India.
